name: Contemporary Romance
description: Character-driven love story with emotional depth, realistic obstacles, and satisfying HEA

entities.name: Protagonist A - The Caretaker
entities.description: Competent, giving, everyone's rock. Forgot how to receive. Career-focused but lonely.

attributes.arc: learns to receive -> chooses self -> equal partnership

entities.name: Protagonist B - The Free Spirit
entities.description: Chaotic, passionate, commitment-phobic on surface. Actually terrified of being truly seen.

attributes.career: freelance artist / traveling nurse / startup founder
attributes.wound: betrayal - ex cheated / best friend stole partner

entities.name: The Best Friend / Confidant
entities.description: Voice of reason, comic relief, sees both clearly. Has own quiet subplot.

entities.name: The Ex / Obstacle
entities.description: Returns at worst time. Not villain - just reminder of past patterns.

attributes.resolution: protagonist chooses current love over past comfort

entities.name: The Cozy Coffee Shop / Bookstore
entities.description: Third place where they meet, fight, make up. Community hub.

attributes.atmosphere: warm, lived-in, regulars know each other

entities.name: Protagonist A's Apartment
entities.description: Organized, peaceful, empty. Reflects controlled life. Becomes messy with love.

plot_threads.title: The Meet Cute
plot_threads.description: Coffee spill / mistaken identity / forced proximity at wedding / rival businesses

plot_threads.title: The Fake Dating / Forced Proximity
plot_threads.description: Need date for event / snowed in / renovation forces cohabitation / work project

plot_threads.title: The Black Moment
plot_threads.description: Miscommunication / ex returns / fear triggers flight / secret revealed

plot_threads.title: The Grand Gesture
plot_threads.description: Not grand - quiet. Shows up. Stays. Chooses daily.

world_rules.rule: HEA (Happily Ever After) or HFN (Happy For Now) is non-negotiable
Both POVs get equal weight. Dual POV preferred.
world_rules.exceptions: Single POV only if deliberate artistic choice

world_rules.rule: External obstacles (distance, rivals, timing) serve internal growth
world_rules.exceptions: Internal conflict (fear, wound) is the REAL obstacle

world_rules.rule: Enthusiastic consent in all intimate scenes. Communication is sexy.

foreshadowing.content: Protagonist A's coffee order remembered by barista - Protagonist B notices
Protagonist B's keychain has photo of deceased pet - vulnerability glimpse
Best friend warns: 'You're doing the thing where you push away what you want'
